message:
fix: quiesce pager state before export/copy, add round-trip interop tests

Add quiesce_pager_export_state() called at top of export_bytes() and
copy_database_to(): checks no active transaction (returns Busy),
invalidates cached read snapshots and write txns so pager sees clean
state. Fixes stale cached pager state leaking into exported images.

Optimize autocommit path: replace ensure_autocommit_txn_with_cx with
ensure_autocommit_txn_with_publication_hint passing already-bound
prebound_publication to avoid redundant bind_pager_publication call.

New round-trip interop tests verify export_bytes() produces valid SQLite
readable by rusqlite, and import_bytes() ingests rusqlite-created DBs
(including non-default 8192 page size).

Also update beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
